docket_entries.description: CON'T REQUEST TO ADVANCE DATE TO 6/05/02, FILED BY DEFT. SENT TO COURT OFR ORDER.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-25-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 9-25-02 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
